_comment: Pinned Groth16 predicate-verifier minting policies, per network and operator.
This is the TRUST ROOT for zkPredicate proofs: verify-pac.mjs only accepts a
predicate token minted under a policyId listed here. An empty map means
'trust nothing' -> every zkPredicate check fails until you pin the real hash.
Populate from a trusted source, NOT from the PAC being verified:
or read the confirmed on-chain mint policyId of a known-good predicate tx.
A change of the trusted setup (zk/artifacts/daypass-groth16-setup.*.json)
changes the VK and therefore the policyId, so re-pin after any setup change.
You may also pass extra trusted hashes at run time without editing this file:
